mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_ROLE AS userRole FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_PW = #{userPw}
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USER_PW AS userPw, USER_NAME AS userName, BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, USER_EMAIL AS userEmail, USER_ROLE AS userRole FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID AS userId , USER_NAME AS userName , USER_EMAIL AS userEmail , USER_ROLE AS userRole , TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM TB_MEMBER ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET USER_PW = #{userPw}, USER_NAME = #{userName}, BIRTH_DATE = #{birthDate}, USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
